name: slot-text
title: Slot Text
author: Daniel Belyi
description: Rolls caller-controlled state labels one grapheme at a time while exposing one semantic text value.

files.content:
declare const stylesheet: string;
export default stylesheet;

changes: Imported the bundled stylesheet from the React adapter for a closed shadcn install payload.
Rendered one visually hidden semantic text copy and isolated the animated old and new faces in an aria-hidden visual subtree.
Rendered the initial visual value before effects run so server output and hydration retain the caller-provided text.
Added a shared prefers-reduced-motion guard that cancels running work and renders the latest target directly.

license.scope: src/react.ts, src/index.ts, src/slotText.ts, src/dom.ts, src/text.ts, src/timing.ts, src/constants.ts, style.css, and style.css.d.ts

modifications.change: Wired the bundled CSS, separated one semantic text copy from the aria-hidden visual animation, and retained the initial visual value in server output.
modifications.reason: Make the source-copy install self-contained, prevent old and new animation faces from becoming duplicate accessible text, and keep the label visible before hydration.

modifications.change: Added a shared reduced-motion branch that cancels timers and renders the final target immediately.
modifications.reason: Respect the user's motion preference across both the React adapter and low-level controller without changing their public options.
